basic_details.job_title: ACTREC Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC)
basic_details.short_information: The Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC) has published the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 under Advt. No. ACTREC/ADVT-101/2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 JRF position on a contractual basis. Candidates not exceeding 28 years of age and holding a B.S. 4-year programme, B.Pharm, MBBS, Integrated BS-MS, M.Sc., B.E., B.Tech, or an equivalent degree with at least 55% marks and having qualified NET/GATE are eligible to apply. Interested candidates can submit their applications via email on or before 18 June 2026. The official notificatio

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 28 years Age relaxation is applicable up to 5 years for candidates belonging to Scheduled Castes/Tribes/OBC, women, and physically handicapped candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: B.S. 4 years programme /BPharm/MBBS/Integrated BS-MS/MSc/BE/BTech or equivalent degree, with 55% marks and passing of NET/GATE test.
qualification.details: B.S. 4 years programme /BPharm/MBBS/Integrated BS-MS/MSc/BE/BTech or equivalent degree, with 55% marks and passing of NET/GATE test.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 18-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ACTREC Junior Research Fellow (JRF) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 18th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.S. 4 years programme, BPharm, MBBS, Integrated BS-MS, MSc, BE, or BTech degree with at least 55% marks and have passed the NET/GATE test.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow post is 28 years. Age relaxation is provided for certain categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 37,100 to Rs. 48,100 per month, which includes basic pay and House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview, which will be conducted in a hybrid mode.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. Candidates need to send their complete application along with required documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q8. Where is ACTREC located?
faq.answer: ACTREC is located in Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, with the pincode 410210.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any relaxations in the upper age limit?
faq.answer: Yes, the upper age limit is relaxable up to 5 years for candidates belonging to Scheduled Castes/Tribes/OBC, women, and physically handicapped candidates.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be attached with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs with their application.
